description: MD OHCQ: General operating rooms minimum 400 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Maryland.
citation: COMAR 10.07.01 / Maryland Office of Health Care Quality

description: MD OHCQ: Single-bed patient room minimum 130 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 110 sq ft per patient.
MD OHCQ: ICU cubicle minimum 200 sq ft clear; open-bay ICU minimum 150 sq ft per patient.
MD OHCQ: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 130 sq ft per treatment space.
MD OHCQ: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
MD OHCQ: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
MD OHCQ: Certificate of Need required from Maryland Health Care Commission (MHCC) for all new hospital construction, beds, and services. Maryland is a strict CON state.
citation: Maryland Health-General Article §19-101 — Maryland Health Care Commission CON

description: MD OHCQ: All new hospital construction plans require plan review and approval by Maryland OHCQ prior to construction. Inspection required at substantial completion.
